text: After the poem exercise, the meeting settles into something almost normal. Almost. Vermia has produced a notebook from somewhere and is listing things you need to know about Scatha.

speaker: Vermia
text: Okay so the key tenets. One: Scatha dwells beneath. Not underground necessarily — more like beneath the surface of things. Beneath what you think you know.

speaker: Vermia
text: Two: worms are sacred but Scatha is not a worm. Scatha is what worms aspire to. It's a distinction people always get wrong.

speaker: Grubwin
text: I've never seen any source for that distinction.

speaker: Vermia
text: I made it up in year one and it stuck. That's basically how all theology works.

speaker: Mawla
text: She's not wrong.

speaker: Vermia
text: Three: poetry is our primary form of worship. Scatha communicates through metaphor. That's why literature club. That's why ALL of this.
She gestures at the entire room. The poster. The handmade journals. A small clay worm figure on the windowsill you somehow missed earlier.

speaker: [player]
text: Did you make that?

speaker: Vermia
text: Grubwin made it.

speaker: Grubwin
text: It was for a pottery class. I ran out of ideas.

speaker: Mawla
text: It's genuinely impressive. The detail on the crown is good.

speaker: Grubwin
text: Thank you. I spent three weeks on the crown.

speaker: Grubwin
text: Please don't read into that.
The door bangs open. A boy enters at high velocity carrying what appears to be a foam-board presentation. He is slightly out of breath.

speaker: Dirtus
text: FELLOW DEVOTEES. I have done it. I have completed the Summoning Proposal.

speaker: Vermia
text: DIRTUS! You're here! What is the Summoning Proposal?!

speaker: Grubwin
text: I'm already worried.

speaker: Dirtus
text: A structured, five-step plan to summon Scatha from the game world into our reality. Slide one—

speaker: Mawla
text: You made slides.

speaker: Dirtus
text: I made EIGHT slides.

speaker: Grubwin
text: Dirtus. We have talked about this. Scatha is a Hypixel Skyblock mob. You cannot summon game data into physical reality.

speaker: Dirtus
text: That's what they said about electricity.

speaker: Grubwin
text: That is NOTHING like what they said about electricity.

speaker: Vermia
text: Let him present! Dirtus, you have the floor. Scatha is listening.

speaker: Dirtus
text: Step one: we need a ritual location. I've scouted the school basement—

speaker: Mawla
text: There is no school basement.

speaker: Dirtus
text: There is a maintenance tunnel under the gym. It counts.

speaker: Grubwin
text: It absolutely does not count.

He flips to slide two. It's a hand-drawn diagram of what appears to be a chalk circle with a worm drawn in the middle and several arrows pointing at it labeled things like 'WORM ENERGY IN' and 'SCATHA MANIFESTS HERE'.

speaker: [player]
text: Is that a pentagram with worm segments instead of a star?

speaker: Dirtus
text: It's a Scathagram. I invented the term.

speaker: Mawla
text: I kind of respect the commitment.

speaker: Grubwin
text: Don't encourage him.

speaker: Vermia
text: DIRTUS. This is incredible. This is the most devotional thing anyone has brought to a meeting since I wrote the Grand Hymn.

speaker: Vermia
text: Speaking of which — new member present, which means we should perform the Grand Hymn. Right now. As a welcome.

speaker: Grubwin
text: We're not doing the Grand Hymn on a Tuesday.

speaker: Vermia
text: Scatha doesn't observe the Western calendar, Grubwin.

options.label: Ask to hear the Grand Hymn
Ask Mawla how she actually feels about all this
